title: neotorularia torulosa
intro: Neotorularia torulosa, also known as Torularia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of China. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neotorularia torulosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations such as patent medicines and infusions.
